lines.speaker: Fernahei
lines.text: Welcome to Fernahei's Fishing Shop Bwana! Would you like to see my items?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, but thanks for the offer.

lines.speaker: Fernahei
lines.text: That's fine and thanks for your interest.

sections.title: Talking to Fernahei before completing Shilo Village

lines.speaker: Fernahei
lines.text: I'm getting out of here Bwana, the place is infested with zombies.
